Bahala Na Gang.description: The Bahala Na Gang (BNG) is a Filipino street gang founded in the early 1940s in Sampaloc, Manila, Philippines by Divino Talastas. It initially formed to counter the Sige-Sige Gang and later spread to the United States. The gang is involved in drug trafficking, weapons trafficking, and murder. It remains active with territory in the Philippines and the United States.

Cheetham Hill Gang.description: Organised crime group based in Cheetham, Manchester, England, established by the early 1980s. Engaged in drug trafficking, weapon trafficking, armed robbery, and other serious crimes. Known for turf wars with Moss Side and Salford gangs, and for controlling Manchester's club scene. The gang was at its peak between the late 1980s and early 2000s and remains active.

descriptions: Cheetham Hill Gang is allied with British crime firms.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: British crime firms

descriptions: Cheetham Hill Gang and Pepperhill Mob were in conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: The Pepperhill Mob, rich and well armed despite their youth, fought back. The two gangs vied with each other in stabbings, tit-for-tat shootings and murder

edges.evidence_quote: Later, The Gooch Close Gang often bought and sold drugs to Cheetham Hill. The Gooch had close ties to Cheetham Hill, with the cousin of the Cheetham Hill Gang's head being a leading figure in the Gooch.

Russian mafia.description: A collective of various organized crime groups originating and operating in Russia, also known as bratva. It emerged and expanded significantly after the collapse of the Soviet Union in the 1990s, becoming a highly organized and globalized criminal network. The Russian mafia engages in a wide range of criminal activities including human trafficking, drug trafficking, and money laundering. It operates internationally, with presence in post-Soviet states, the European Union, Israel, the United States, and Australia.

descriptions: Kosovar-Albanian groups rival Russian mafia in Antwerp.
edges.evidence_quote: In Antwerp , the Kosovar-Albanian crime groups are affiliated with the Hells Angels and has rivalled Russian and Ukrainian mafia groups for control of the prostitution and racketeering market.

Cartel de la Costa.description: Colombian drug trafficking organization active in northern Colombia from the 1980s to 1998. It controlled drug trade in the Caribbean region and managed routes to the Caribbean and Central America. Initially based in Santa Marta and later Barranquilla, it was led by José Rafael Abello Silva and later Alberto Orlández Gamboa. The cartel dissolved in 1998 due to arrests, deaths, and the incursion of the AUC's Northern Bloc.

descriptions: The Cartel de Cali was allied with the Cartel de la Costa.
edges.evidence_quote: Aliados: ... Cartel de la Costa

descriptions: AUC's Northern Bloc took over the Costa cartel's drug routes after its decline.
edges.evidence_quote: El Bloque Norte de las AUC se apropió de las rutas del narcotráfico del cartel de la Costa y se las encargó a los paramilitares...

descriptions: Infobox lists Cartel de Cali as an enemy until its dismantlement.
edges.evidence_quote: Enemigos: Cartel de Cali (Hasta su desarticulación)

descriptions: Cartel de Cali assigned Caribbean routes as a territorial franchise to the Costa cartel's leader.
edges.evidence_quote: Al caer el cartel de Medellín, el cartel de Cali asignó las rutas del Caribe como franquicia territorial a Orlández Gamboa.

descriptions: A leader of the Costa cartel was a partner of the Guajira cartel.
edges.evidence_quote: Salomón Camacho Mora alias "Papa Grande": Segundo al mando del Cartel de la Costa y socio del Cartel de La Guajira.

descriptions: A lieutenant of the Costa cartel also led the Tierra cartel.
edges.evidence_quote: Libardo Parra, alias "El Flaco" o "El Guajiro": Lugarteniente de Orlández Gamboa, también lideró el "Cartel de la Tierra".

La Guajira Cartel.description: Criminal organization originating from Maicao, operating in the Guajira Peninsula on the Colombia-Venezuela border. Specializes in contraband of gasoline, weapons, minerals, stolen cars, cattle, and drug trafficking. Also involved in robberies, extortion, assassinations, kidnappings, and usury. Has ties to the Cartel of the Suns and operates across La Guajira Department in Colombia and Zulia state in Venezuela.

descriptions: Alianza Fronteriza is listed as an opponent of the AGC in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Opponents: ELN, FARC dissidents, La Oficina, La Empresa, Alianza Fronteriza

descriptions: Alianza Fronteriza is listed as an opponent of the Clan del Golfo in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Opponents: ELN , FARC dissidents , La Oficina , La Empresa , Alianza Fronteriza

descriptions: The marriage between Clíver Alcalá and Marta González is said to have created an alliance between the two cartels.
edges.evidence_quote: According to the Colombian outlet Caracol Radio , the marriage between Alcalá and González would have meant an alliance between the La Guajira and Los Soles cartels.

descriptions: Clan del Golfo is listed as a rival in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Clan del Golfo , Tren de Aragua

descriptions: Tren de Aragua is listed as a rival in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Clan del Golfo , Tren de Aragua

descriptions: The IRA and CID were enemies during the Irish Civil War.
edges.evidence_quote: the CID were despised by the Anti-Treaty IRA, which referred to them as 'The Murder Gang'.

descriptions: Highwaymen became a puppet club of Hells Angels in 1983.
edges.evidence_quote: the Highwaymen became a puppet club

descriptions: Trisciuoglio-Tolonese is a battery of Società foggiana.
edges.evidence_quote: Batteria Trisciuoglio-Tolonese

descriptions: De Luca Bossa was in a bloody feud with the Misso-Mazzarella-Sarno families.
edges.evidence_quote: La lunga e sanguinosa faida che ha visto contrapposte negli anni le famiglie De Luca Bossa e Misso-Mazzarella-Sarno

descriptions: The Corleonesi were rivals of Stefano Bontade's faction.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Stefano Bontade

descriptions: Ghetto Brothers called a peace meeting attended by Peacemakers.
edges.evidence_quote: It took place on December 8, 1971, and was attended by two hundred representatives from dozens of Bronx gangs, including the Black Pearls, Black Spades, Dirty Dozens, Dutchmen, Latin Spades, Liberated Panthers, Magnificent Seven, Peacemakers, Royal Javelins, Savage Skulls, Seven Immortals, Turbans, and Young Sinners, together with police and city officials.

descriptions: The two sets were involved in a conflict that led to the 2022 Sacramento mass shooting.
edges.evidence_quote: the shooting was related to a conflict between the local Garden Blocc Crips and Del Paso Heights Bloods gangs

Cartel del Dorado.description: Colombian criminal organization active from 1970 to 2010, based in Bogotá. It supplied narcotics to the Medellín Cartel and later became one of the world's largest under leader Luis Caicedo. Engaged in drug trafficking, money laundering, extortion, kidnapping, human trafficking, and arms trafficking. The organization was dismantled after Caicedo's arrest in 2010.

descriptions: The Cartel de Cali was allied with the Cartel de Bogotá.
edges.evidence_quote: Aliados: ... Cartel de Bogotá

descriptions: Justo Pastor Perafán had narcos relationships with Cartel de Cali despite enmity between Medellín and Cali.
edges.evidence_quote: Perafán tuvo relaciones narcos tanto con el cartel de Medellín como el de Cali, a pesar de la enemistad entre ambos.

descriptions: Justo Pastor Perafán led both Cartel del Dorado and Cartel del Cauca simultaneously.
edges.evidence_quote: Uno de los más prominentes líderes del cartel fue el narcotraficante Justo Pastor Perafán , organización que dirigía a la par con el Cartel del Cauca, basado en la ciudad de Popayán .

descriptions: Cartel del Dorado supplied drug traffickers to Cartel de Medellín and had mutual collaboration.
edges.evidence_quote: En las décadas de 1980 y 1990, el cartel suplía de narcotraficantes al cartel de Medellín . Había colaboración mutua y varios de los miembros del cartel pasaron a formar parte de las estructuras del cartel de Medellín.

descriptions: Evil Ones is a puppet club of Hells Angels in Drummondville.
edges.evidence_quote: Every Quebec region had its own puppet club: the Rockers Motor Club in Montreal, the Rowdy Ones in Sorel, the Evil Ones in Drummondville, the Satan's Guard in the Saguenay region, and the Jokers in St-Jean

descriptions: Evil Ones is a puppet club of Hells Angels.
edges.evidence_quote: the South Shore clubhouse of the Evil Ones, a Hells Angels puppet club

descriptions: The Evil Ones were a puppet gang of the Hells Angels.
edges.evidence_quote: all of the Rockers and all of the Evil Ones puppet gangs

descriptions: George Cornell switched from the Watney Streeters to ally with the Richardson Gang.
edges.evidence_quote: Cornell was originally a member of an East End gang called "The Watney Streeters" and later became involved with the Krays. However, he changed sides around 1964 and allied himself with the Richardsons.

descriptions: George Cornell, a member of the Watney Streeters, became involved with the Krays.
edges.evidence_quote: Cornell was originally a member of an East End gang called "The Watney Streeters" and later became involved with the Krays.

descriptions: Gallace are among the major allies of the 'ndrine sanlucote.
edges.evidence_quote: Sono tra i maggiori alleati dei Farao-Marincola e delle 'ndrine sanlucote.

descriptions: Nutty Blocc Compton Crips are allies with Atlantic Drive Compton Crips.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: South Side Compton Crips , Atlantic Drive Compton Crips Garden Blocc Crips Sacramento Ca

descriptions: Atlantic Drive Compton Crips is listed as an ally in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Atlantic Drive Compton Crips , Nutty Blocc Compton Crips

Los Viagras.description: Los Viagras is a Mexican criminal group based in Michoacán, founded around 2014 as a self-defense group and later evolving into a drug trafficking organization. Led by Nicolás Sierra Santana, the group is involved in methamphetamine production and trafficking, and has been in conflict with the Jalisco New Generation Cartel. They have been known for using minors as human shields and are a major source of violence in the Tierra Caliente region. In 2024, they allied with the CJNG against Cárteles Unidos.

descriptions: La Resistencia allied with Los Viagras in 2015.
edges.evidence_quote: La Resistencia made an alliance in 2015 with Los Viagras and remnants of the Familia Michoacana, Knights Templar, and local self-defence groups to expel the CJNG out of the region

descriptions: Cárteles Unidos lists Los Viagras as allies in infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: La Familia Michoacana , Los Viagras , La Nueva Familia Michoacana , Los Blancos de Troya , Los Correa

descriptions: Los Viagras are a component group of Cárteles Unidos.
edges.evidence_quote: Cárteles Unidos, conocido inicialmente como La Resistencia, es una organización criminal mexicana compuesta por miembros del Cártel de Tepalcatepec , Los Viagras

descriptions: Infobox lists Los Viagras as an enemy of Guerreros Unidos.
edges.evidence_quote: Enemigos: Gobierno de México, Ejército Mexicano, Armada de México, Cártel de Sinaloa, Cártel Jalisco Nueva Generación, Cartel del Golfo, La Familia Michoacana, Los Viagras, EPR.

descriptions: The Gulf Cartel created Los Sierra as a criminal group.
edges.evidence_quote: A lo largo de los años, el CDG creó grupos criminales como ... Los Sierra o División Sierra

descriptions: Cártel del Golfo created Los Sierra as a criminal group.
edges.evidence_quote: A lo largo de los años, el CDG creó grupos criminales como Los Ciclones , Los Metros , Los Escorpiones , Los Rojos , Los Sierra o División Sierra , Los Ceros, Fuerzas Especiales Grupo Sombra (F.E.G.S.), Los Zetas , entre otros.

descriptions: CJNG is fighting Los Viagras in Michoacán and Guerrero.
edges.evidence_quote: The CJNG are fighting ... Los Viagras ... for the states of Michoacán and Guerrero

descriptions: CJNG fights Los Viagras in Michoacán and Guerrero.
edges.evidence_quote: Los Viagras and La Familia Michoacana for the states of Michoacán and Guerrero

descriptions: Jalisco New Generation Cartel is fighting Los Viagras.
edges.evidence_quote: The Knights Templar Cartel are now allied with the Jalisco New Generation Cartel and are fighting the La Nueva Familia Michoacana Organization and its armed wing Los Viagras

descriptions: CJNG attacked a camp as part of a war with Los Viagras.
edges.evidence_quote: El 25 de abril de 2020, asaltan un campamento clandestino en Aguililla, Michoacán. Aparentemente el ataque fue parte de la guerra entre el CJNG y Los Viagras.

descriptions: Infobox lists Los Viagras as an ally.
edges.evidence_quote: Aliados: ... Los Viagras

descriptions: CJNG is allied with Los Viagras per infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Aliados: Los Viagras

descriptions: The infobox lists Los Viagras as an ally of CJNG.
edges.evidence_quote: Aliados: Cártel de Tijuana, Cártel del Golfo, Los Metros, Los Chapitos, Los Viagras, Cártel de Caborca, Fuerza Anti-Unión, Los Lobos

descriptions: Knights Templar Cartel is fighting Los Viagras.
edges.evidence_quote: The Knights Templar Cartel are now allied with the Jalisco New Generation Cartel and are fighting the La Nueva Familia Michoacana Organization and its armed wing Los Viagras

descriptions: Caballeros Templarios considers Los Viagras as enemies.
edges.evidence_quote: Enemigos: ... Los Viagras

descriptions: Caballeros Templarios considers Los Viagras an enemy.
edges.evidence_quote: Enemigos: Gobierno de México , Grupos criminales: Los Viagras , Cártel de Jalisco Nueva Generación , Cártel de Juárez , Los Zetas , Grupos de Autodefensa Comunitaria , Cartel de los Beltrán Leyva , MS-13 , La Familia Michoacana

descriptions: La Familia Michoacana is in conflict with Los Viagras.
edges.evidence_quote: Infighting between La Familia Michoacana and La Nueva Familia Michoacana Organization and its armed wing Los Viagras is ongoing.

descriptions: Infobox lists Los Viagras as an ally.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Los Viagras

descriptions: Los Viagras is listed as an ally of La Familia Michoacana in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Sinaloa Cartel , La Nueva Familia Michoacana , Los Viagras , Menace of Destruction , Mara Salvatrucha , Beltrán-Leyva Cartel , Los Tequileros , Guerrero's Unidos , Juarez Cartel , Tijuana Cartel , Los Zetas (Since 2004) , Rural Defense Force

descriptions: La Familia Michoacana allied with Los Viagras to fight CJNG.
edges.evidence_quote: A partir del 2019, el Cártel Jalisco Nueva Generación (CJNG) se ha sumado a los enemigos de La Familia Michoacana, al incursionar en Michoacán y el estado de México, por lo que La Familia Michoacana se ha visto obligada a aliarse con Los Viagras y los reductos de Los Caballeros Templarios, para hacer frente al CJNG.

descriptions: Los Viagras is listed as an ally in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Aliados: La Nueva Familia Michoacana, Los Viagras, Caballeros Templarios, Cártel del Milenio, Cártel de Tláhuac, Cártel de Sinaloa, Mara Salvatrucha

descriptions: Listed as an ally in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Aliados: Los Viagras

descriptions: Los Viagras is the armed wing of La Nueva Familia Michoacana Organization.
edges.evidence_quote: La Nueva Familia Michoacana Organization and its armed wing Los Viagras

descriptions: Beltrán-Leyva Cartel was a defunct ally of Los Viagras.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Beltrán-Leyva Cartel (defunct)

descriptions: Infobox lists Cártel de Los Correa as an ally.
edges.evidence_quote: Aliados: ... Cártel de Los Correa

edges.target: Cártel de Santa Rosa de Lima
descriptions: Infobox lists Cártel de Santa Rosa de Lima as an ally.
edges.evidence_quote: Aliados: ... Cártel de Santa Rosa de Lima

descriptions: Los Viagras and Cartel del Abuelo are allied against Jalisco New Generation Cartel.
edges.evidence_quote: Los Viagras and the Cartel del Abuelo were reported as having a 'profound advantage' over New Generation in Tierra Caliente.

descriptions: Los Viagras and CJNG jointly fought against Cárteles Unidos.
edges.evidence_quote: así como la lucha compartida contra Cárteles Unidos.

descriptions: Both groups are mentioned as attacking autodefensas, but no direct relationship between them is stated.
edges.evidence_quote: Los Viagras y los H3

descriptions: Infobox lists Cártel Independiente de Acapulco as an enemy.
edges.evidence_quote: Enemigos: ... Cártel Independiente de Acapulco

descriptions: Cártel Independiente de Acapulco was a defunct ally of Los Viagras.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Cártel Independiente de Acapulco (defunct)

descriptions: Los Viagras and Jalisco New Generation Cartel are in conflict over territory.
edges.evidence_quote: Los Viagras expanded into the drug trade ... which brought them into a turf dispute with the Jalisco New Generation Cartel

descriptions: Los Viagras disputed territory with CJNG before their alliance.
edges.evidence_quote: disputándose el territorio contra el Cártel de Jalisco Nueva Generación (CJNG).

descriptions: Los Viagras has links with Jalisco New Generation Cartel.
edges.evidence_quote: they ended up forming their own cartel called Los Viagras, which has links with the Jalisco New Generation Cartel

descriptions: Los Viagras allied with CJNG after internal disputes.
edges.evidence_quote: las disputas internas terminaron por orillarlos a aliarse con el CJNG

descriptions: Los Viagras allied with CJNG in August 2024 to control extortion and fight Cárteles Unidos.
edges.evidence_quote: En agosto de 2024 se confirmó que Los Viagras se aliaron con el CJNG, sobre todo por el control de las extorsiones contra los productores de aguacate y limón, así como la lucha compartida contra Cárteles Unidos.

descriptions: Los Viagras has both ties and rivalry with Jalisco New Generation Cartel.
edges.evidence_quote: Los Viagras (which is now known to have ties and rivalry with the Jalisco New Generation Cartel).

descriptions: Los Viagras assisted in capturing the leader of Los Caballeros Templarios.
edges.evidence_quote: Former Michoacán security commissioner Alfredo Castillo Cervantes then asked them to assist in the efforts to capture the leader of the Los Caballeros Templarios cartel

descriptions: Knights Templar Cartel is a rival of Los Viagras.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Knights Templar Cartel

descriptions: Los Viagras allied with CJNG to fight Los Caballeros Templarios.
edges.evidence_quote: aliarse con el CJNG, en su lucha para combatir a Los Caballeros Templarios

descriptions: Guardia Michoacana is an ally of Los Viagras.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Guardia Michoacana

descriptions: Los Viagras are a cell/splinter of the Caballeros Templarios.

descriptions: Los Viagras originated as dissidents from Los Caballeros Templarios.
edges.evidence_quote: disidentes de Los Caballeros Templarios y la Familia Michoacana.

descriptions: La Barredora is a rival of Los Viagras.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: La Barredora

descriptions: Los Viagras originated as dissidents from La Familia Michoacana.
edges.evidence_quote: disidentes de Los Caballeros Templarios y la Familia Michoacana.

descriptions: La Nueva Familia Michoacana is an ally of Los Viagras.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: La Nueva Familia Michoacana

descriptions: Infobox lists La Nueva Familia Michoacana as an ally.
edges.evidence_quote: Aliados: La Nueva Familia Michoacana

descriptions: Los Viagras is a sub-unit of the LNFM Cartel.
edges.evidence_quote: Los Viagras ... is an armed wing of the LNFM Cartel

descriptions: Los Blancos De La Troya is an ally of Los Viagras.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Los Blancos De La Troya

descriptions: Los Blancos de Troya is the armed wing of Los Viagras.
edges.evidence_quote: siendo comandante del brazo armado "Los Blancos de Troya" Los Viagras los meses posteriores.

descriptions: Los Viagras fought against Los de Tepeque.
edges.evidence_quote: en su lucha para combatir a Los Caballeros Templarios y "Los de Tepeque" otra banda delictiva local

descriptions: Infobox lists Cártel de Sinaloa as an ally.
edges.evidence_quote: Aliados: ... Cártel de Sinaloa

descriptions: Pueblos Unidos initially defended farmers against Los Viagras, indicating conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: It began in 2021 as a self-defense group defending the local avocado farmers from cartel gangs Los Viagras and Jalisco New Generation

descriptions: Infobox lists Los Viagras as an ally.
edges.evidence_quote: Aliados: Los Viagras

descriptions: Infobox lists Los Viagras as ally.
edges.evidence_quote: Aliados: Los Viagras

descriptions: Yakuza is allied with Los Viagras.
edges.evidence_quote: Aliados: Cártel Jalisco Nueva Generación , Los Viagras , Operativo Sierra Leona , Cartel de Sinaloa

Casamonica clan.description: The Casamonica clan is a mafia criminal organization of Sinti origin operating in the Rome area and other parts of Lazio. Founded in the 1970s by the Casamonica and Di Silvio families, it engages in extortion, drug trafficking, money laundering, and murder. The clan allied with the Banda della Magliana and is still active.

descriptions: Alvaro collaborated with Casamonica and Piromalli-Molè for money laundering.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 25 marzo 2010 viene scoperto un sodalizio tra Pietro D'Ardes, Rocco Casamonica del clan dei Casamonica e i affiliati alla 'ndrangheta dei Piromalli - Molè e Alvaro per il riciclaggio dei proventi illeciti

descriptions: Fazzari members are in close contact with the Casamonica organization.
edges.evidence_quote: esponenti della Famiglia Fazzari in stretto contatto con le locali organizzazioni criminali, tra cui ... i Casamonica

descriptions: Camorra, Casamonica clan, and 'Ndrangheta formed a criminal alliance.
edges.evidence_quote: a criminal alliance between the Sinti criminal organization Casamonica clan, members of the Camorra, and affiliates from the 'Ndrangheta

descriptions: 'Ndrangheta families are now rivals stifling Casamonica clan's power.
edges.evidence_quote: But their mafia power is now also being stifled by the rival 'ndrine and Camorra families

descriptions: 'Ndrangheta provides drugs and protection to Casamonica clan.
edges.evidence_quote: The various families allied of the Camorra and 'Ndrangheta provide it with drugs to sell and protection to operate in its own territory of competence

descriptions: The Casamonica clan inherited contacts with 'Ndrangheta from the Banda della Magliana.
edges.evidence_quote: With the dismantling of the Banda della Magliana, the Clan increased its criminal power by inheriting its criminal dealings and contacts with Camorra and 'Ndrangheta.

descriptions: Casamonica clan allied with Banda della Magliana from 1970s to 1990s.
edges.evidence_quote: The rise to the conquest of the illicit traffic of Rome, occurred, starting from 1970s, with the criminal alliance of the Banda della Magliana, and lasted until the 1990s.

descriptions: The Casamonica clan had criminal collusion with the Banda della Magliana, which provided contacts.
edges.evidence_quote: Its criminal rise took place in the early 1970s, with criminal collusion with the Banda della Magliana, which provided it with initial contacts with Camorra, 'Ndrangheta and Mafia.

descriptions: Camorra families are now rivals stifling Casamonica clan's power.
edges.evidence_quote: But their mafia power is now also being stifled by the rival 'ndrine and Camorra families

descriptions: Camorra provides drugs and protection to Casamonica clan.
edges.evidence_quote: The various families allied of the Camorra and 'Ndrangheta provide it with drugs to sell and protection to operate in its own territory of competence

descriptions: The Casamonica clan inherited contacts with Camorra from the Banda della Magliana.
edges.evidence_quote: With the dismantling of the Banda della Magliana, the Clan increased its criminal power by inheriting its criminal dealings and contacts with Camorra and 'Ndrangheta.

descriptions: Di Silvio family is affiliated with Casamonica clan.
edges.evidence_quote: Police operations that led to the arrest not only of members of the Clan, but also of members of other affiliated families of Sinti origin, such as the Spada and the Di Silvio

descriptions: Casamonica clan helped eliminate the Proietti clan.
edges.evidence_quote: Clan helps the Banda della Magliana in eliminating the rival Proietti Clan which occurred between the end of the 1970s and the beginning of the 1980s.

descriptions: Spada family is affiliated with Casamonica clan.
edges.evidence_quote: Police operations that led to the arrest not only of members of the Clan, but also of members of other affiliated families of Sinti origin, such as the Spada and the Di Silvio

descriptions: Salvatore Annacondia was affiliated with 'Ndrangheta.
edges.evidence_quote: Salvatore Annacondia ,ex Boss era affiliato a Cosa Nostra e N'drangheta

descriptions: Gruppo Annacondia was affiliated with Alessandro Modeo's clan.
edges.evidence_quote: preferendo rimanere affiliato solo con Cosa nostra e con Alessandro Modeo

descriptions: Gruppo Annacondia remained independent from Sacra Corona Unita, not joining it.
edges.evidence_quote: Come quello tarantino dei Modeo, ha avuto una certa indipendenza dalla Sacra Corona Unita: infatti Annacondia non aveva aderito alla SCU voluta da Rogoli

descriptions: Gruppo Annacondia was affiliated with Cosa Nostra.
edges.evidence_quote: preferendo rimanere affiliato solo con Cosa nostra e con Alessandro Modeo

The Carlton Crew.description: Criminal organization based in Melbourne, Australia, founded in the 1970s (possibly mid-1960s) by Gino Rosace. Named after the Carlton suburb, it engaged in racketeering, drug trafficking, and murder. Played a major role in the Melbourne gangland killings and was a rival to 'Ndrangheta groups. Still active with leadership changes in 2019.

descriptions: Honoured Society and Carlton Crew were rivals from 1970s to early 1990s.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Carlton Crew (antagonism in the 1970s to the early 1990s)

descriptions: Honoured Society and Carlton Crew have close cooperation from mid-1990s to present.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Carlton Crew (close cooperation from the mid-1990s to the present)

descriptions: The Moran family is allied with the Carlton Crew.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Carlton Crew , Federated Ship Painters and Dockers Union

descriptions: Carlton Crew had a strong rivalry with the Calabrese Family.
edges.evidence_quote: The organisation had a strong rivalry with the Honoured Society and the Calabrese Family, both of which were Calabrian 'Ndrangheta groups also based in Melbourne.

descriptions: The Carlton Crew was a fierce rival to the Calabrese Family.
edges.evidence_quote: The organisation was a fierce rival to the Honoured Society and the Calabrese Family

descriptions: The Carlton Crew was rivals with the Calabrese Family until the early 90s.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Williams Syndicate, Honoured Society and Calabrese Family (until the early 90s)

descriptions: The Carlton Crew became allies with the Calabrese Family since the mid-90s.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Honoured Society and Calabrese Family (since the mid-90s)

descriptions: Carlton Crew had a strong rivalry with the Honoured Society.
edges.evidence_quote: The organisation had a strong rivalry with the Honoured Society and the Calabrese Family, both of which were Calabrian 'Ndrangheta groups also based in Melbourne.

descriptions: The Carlton Crew was a fierce rival to the Honoured Society.
edges.evidence_quote: The organisation was a fierce rival to the Honoured Society and the Calabrese Family

descriptions: The Carlton Crew was rivals with the Honoured Society until the early 90s.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Williams Syndicate, Honoured Society and Calabrese Family (until the early 90s)

descriptions: The Carlton Crew became allies with the Honoured Society since the mid-90s.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Honoured Society and Calabrese Family (since the mid-90s)

descriptions: The Carlton Crew was allied with the Moran family.
edges.evidence_quote: and were additionally allies of the mostly Irish Moran family

descriptions: The Carlton Crew was allied with Radev Bratva.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Honoured Society and Calabrese Family (since the mid-90s), Moran and Pettingill families, Radev Bratva

descriptions: The Carlton Crew was rivals with the Williams Syndicate.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Williams Syndicate, Honoured Society and Calabrese Family (until the early 90s)

Aldington Gang.description: A band of smugglers active in the Romney Marshes and shores of Kent, England, during the early 19th century. Founded around 1817, they used The Walnut Tree Inn as their headquarters and were known for large-scale smuggling operations involving spirits, tobacco, and salt. They were likely the last major smuggling gang in Kent.

descriptions: Lomonte gang murdered Giuseppe Fanaro, a member of the Morello family.
edges.evidence_quote: In November 1913, Fanaro was murdered by members of the Lomonte and Alfred Mineo 's gangs.

descriptions: Marando and Stefanelli were in a feud (faida) over a drug shipment in the late 1990s.
edges.evidence_quote: La faida scoppiò per una partita di droga

descriptions: Marando collaborated with Stefanelli in Liguria until early 1990s.
edges.evidence_quote: in Liguria con gli Stefanelli fino all'inizio degli anni '90

descriptions: 3-N-G feuded with Calliope Porch Boyz in early 2000s.
edges.evidence_quote: In the early 2000s they were known to feud with another Central City gang called the "Calliope Porch Boyz".

Águilas Negras.description: Colombian drug trafficking and paramilitary organization formed after the demobilization of the AUC between 2004 and 2006. Active from 2006 to 2011, it was involved in drug trafficking, extortion, racketeering, and kidnapping. Led by Vicente Castaño, the group operated primarily in Norte de Santander and Barrancabermeja. It ceased to exist around 2011, with the name later used as a franchise by unrelated criminal gangs.

descriptions: Águilas Negras formed from former AUC members.
edges.evidence_quote: Otros integrantes de las AUC incurrieron nuevamente en su accionar delictivo, y conformaron varios grupos neoparamilitares denominados Bandas criminales emergentes (Bacrim) o Grupos Armados Organizados, entre ellos las Águilas Negras y las Autodefensas Gaitanistas de Colombia (Clan del Golfo).

descriptions: Águilas Negras is a successor group formed by former AUC members.
edges.evidence_quote: Otros integrantes de las AUC incurrieron nuevamente en su accionar delictivo, y conformaron varios grupos neoparamilitares denominados Bandas criminales emergentes (Bacrim) o Grupos Armados Organizados, entre ellos las Águilas Negras y las Autodefensas Gaitanistas de Colombia (Clan del Golfo).

descriptions: Águilas Negras formed from former AUC members after demobilization.
edges.evidence_quote: Otros integrantes de las AUC incurrieron nuevamente en su accionar delictivo, y conformaron varios grupos neoparamilitares denominados Bandas criminales emergentes (Bacrim) o Grupos Armados Organizados, entre ellos las Águilas Negras y las Autodefensas Gaitanistas de Colombia (Clan del Golfo).

descriptions: Águilas Negras is listed among Bacrim that emerged after AUC demobilization, indicating a successor relationship.
edges.evidence_quote: Clan Úsuga ( Clan del Golfo o Autodefensas Gaitanistas ), Los Rastrojos , el Ejército Revolucionario Popular Antisubversivo de Colombia (ERPAC) , las Águilas Negras , Los Paisas , la Oficina de Envigado y otras facciones menores como Los Machos y Renacer

descriptions: Former members of Águilas Negras became part of Clan del Golfo.
edges.evidence_quote: el grupo asumió todas las actividades criminales del exnarcotraficante Daniel Rendón Herrera , alias Don Mario , impulsor de varias organizaciones al margen de la ley (hoy día inactivas y cuyos exmiembros pasaron a ser parte del Clan del Golfo); entre ellas las Águilas Negras

descriptions: Clan del Golfo absorbed members of Águilas Negras after it became inactive.
edges.evidence_quote: El grupo asumió todas las actividades criminales del ex narcotraficante Daniel Rendón Herrera , alias Don Mario , impulsor de varias organizaciones al margen de la ley (hoy día inactivas y cuyos exmiembros pasaron a ser parte del Clan del Golfo); entre ellas las Águilas Negras

edges.source: Ejército Revolucionario Popular Antisubversivo de Colombia
descriptions: ERPAC is listed alongside Águilas Negras as one of the four most powerful BACRIM groups, implying a peer relationship.
edges.evidence_quote: O Ejército Revolucionario Popular Antisubversivo de Colombia (ERPAC) é um dos quatro grupos criminosos emergentes a serviço do narcotráfico na Colômbia ( BACRIM ) mais poderosos juntamente com " Los Rastrojos ", Águilas Negras e " Los Urabeños ".

descriptions: Black Eagles are a successor group to AUC.
edges.evidence_quote: However, local successors such as the Black Eagles continue to exist and death threats have been made using its name.

descriptions: Águilas Negras members were formerly part of the AUC demobilization.
edges.evidence_quote: Algunos de sus miembros formaron parte de la desmovilización de las Autodefensas Unidas de Colombia (AUC).

descriptions: Black Eagles were closely linked with Usuga Clan.
edges.evidence_quote: The Black Eagles were ... said to be closely linked with the Usuga Clan drug cartel and right-wing neo-paramilitary group.

descriptions: Remnants of Águilas Negras merged into Clan del Golfo.
edges.evidence_quote: las Águilas Negras empezaron a desarticularse y los reductos que aún quedaban se anexaron a la banda criminal del Clan Úsuga (hoy día llamada Clan del Golfo)

descriptions: Los Rastrojos is listed as a group under Black Eagles.
edges.evidence_quote: Groups - Los Rastrojos : operating in Cauca and Valle del Cauca (approximately 1,200 members).

descriptions: Mano Negra is listed as a group under Black Eagles.
edges.evidence_quote: Groups - Mano Negra : operating in Putumayo (unknown number of members).

descriptions: Black Eagles formed after the AUC demobilization, composed of former AUC members.
edges.evidence_quote: Black Eagles ... emerged from the failures of the demobilization process between 2004 and 2006, which aimed to disarm the United Self-Defense Units of Colombia (AUC).

descriptions: In the 1960s, Albanese together with Raso and Gullace clashed with Facchineri, Marvaso, and Monteleone.
edges.evidence_quote: Negli anni sessanta a Cittanova insieme ai Raso e ai Gullace si sono scontrati con i Facchineri , i Marvaso e i Monteleone.

Joe Boys.description: The Joe Boys were a Chinese American youth gang founded in the 1960s in San Francisco's Chinatown by Joe Fong, a former Wah Ching member. They were involved in drug trafficking, extortion, robbery, and murder. The gang was active from 1969 to 1977 and had ties to the Suey Sing Tong while rivaling the Wah Ching and Hop Sing Tong.

descriptions: The text contrasts the Continentals with Chung Ching Yee, noting that Chung Ching Yee recruited immigrants while Continentals could not.
edges.evidence_quote: After some time they had trouble recruiting new members due to the small number of American-born Chinese, whereas new gangs such as the White Eagles and Chung Ching Yee in California were able to recruit new members who were immigrants from Hong Kong and mainland China.

descriptions: The infobox lists Hop Sing Tong as a rival of the Joe Boys.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Wah Ching , Hop Sing Tong

descriptions: Both are examples of Chinese American street gangs with connections to tongs and triads, but no direct relationship is stated.
edges.evidence_quote: Examples of such street gangs include the Joe Boys and Jackson Street Boys, which are named after the major street of San Francisco's Chinatown.

descriptions: The infobox lists Suey Sing Tong as an ally of the Joe Boys.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Suey Sing Tong

descriptions: The Joe Boys (Chung Ching Yee) and Wah Ching were engaged in a violent war.
edges.evidence_quote: By 1973, the struggle between the Chung Ching Yee and the Wah Ching had erupted into a war that had claimed 13 lives since 1969

descriptions: Joe Fong's group splintered from Yau Lai in early 1971.
edges.evidence_quote: Joe Fong's group had splintered from the main Yau Lai in early 1971

descriptions: Wah Ching was involved in the Golden Dragon Massacre with the Joe Boys, a rival gang.
edges.evidence_quote: Wah Ching first received widespread media attention because of the 1977 Golden Dragon Massacre (GDM) involving another Chinese gang, the Chung Ching Yee, or Joe Boys (JBS).

descriptions: Chung Ching Yee is listed as a rival of Wah Ching in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Chung Ching Yee

descriptions: Both are examples of Chinese American street gangs with connections to tongs and triads, but no direct relationship is stated.
edges.evidence_quote: Examples of such street gangs include the Joe Boys and Jackson Street Boys, which are named after the major street of San Francisco's Chinatown.

descriptions: The Croxteth Crew killed a member of the Norris Green Strand Crew, indicating a violent rivalry.
edges.evidence_quote: The murder came the day before the first anniversary of the killing of Liam Smith, an alleged member of a rival gang, the Norris Green Strand Crew, who was shot dead by members of the Croxteth Crew on 23 August 2006.

descriptions: Vallelunga and Turrà are historical allies.
edges.evidence_quote: Storicamente alleati dei Turrà di Guardavalle

descriptions: Junky Funky Kids is a smaller gang allied to The Americans or Hard Livings.
edges.evidence_quote: Smaller gangs in Cape Town that might be allied to one of the two larger umbrella gangs include Young Dixie Boys, Clever Kids, Naughty Boys, the Junky Funky Kids,1400 EstateBoyz ,Respectable Peacefuls, Wonder Kids, School Boys and Yuru Cats.

descriptions: Junky Funky Kids is a rival of The Americans as it is affiliated with The British.
edges.evidence_quote: The Rivals of the Americans gang include all gangs affiliated to the British gang corporate body. These include the Hard Livings , 28s street gang, Junky Funky Kids

descriptions: Junky Funky Kids is a smaller gang allied to The Americans or Hard Livings.
edges.evidence_quote: Smaller gangs in Cape Town that might be allied to one of the two larger umbrella gangs include Young Dixie Boys, Clever Kids, Naughty Boys, the Junky Funky Kids,1400 EstateBoyz ,Respectable Peacefuls, Wonder Kids, School Boys and Yuru Cats.

descriptions: Torcasio is allied with Giorgi-Pizzata.
edges.evidence_quote: La 'ndrina Torcasio è una cosca malavitosa o 'ndrina della 'ndrangheta calabrese di Lamezia Terme alleata dei Gualtieri, dei Cerra e dei Giorgi-Pizzata di San Luca

descriptions: Yardies are listed as allies of No Limit Soldiers in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Colombian cartels , Penose , Yardies , Zoe Pound

descriptions: The Derry Boys were a junior subgroup of the Billy Boys.
edges.evidence_quote: The Billy Boys also formed a junior group whose members were teenagers called the Derry Boys.

descriptions: The Billy Boys and Norman Conks frequently clashed due to territorial and sectarian rivalry.
edges.evidence_quote: the Protestant Bridgeton (or Billy) Boys who frequently clashed with the Roman Catholic Norman Conks in the East End of the city.

descriptions: The Norman Conks frequently engaged in street fights with the Billy Boys.
edges.evidence_quote: They were often involved in street fighting with the Protestant Billy Boys of Bridgeton

descriptions: Los Dragones is a rival of Los Ciclones per infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Los Metros , Cártel del Noreste , Los Dragones , Sinaloa Cartel
